TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ralph_Beard, title = Ralph_Beard, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ralph_Beard} }

S.FORM: Ralph Beard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1927, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 12, Ralph Beard, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ralph Beard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1927, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 12, Ralph Beard, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ralpħ βear* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, ralpħ βear*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
